message:
feat(ui): add Phase 3-4 UI/UX polish

- Add sticky collapsing header for mobile (hides on scroll down, shows on scroll up)
- Create AnimatedSection component with intersection observer for scroll animations
- Add scroll-triggered fade-up animation to Browse section
- Redesign Settings page with icons, colored backgrounds, and hover effects
- Add SettingCard component with support for disabled states and badges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
